name: Prince Philippe || Arranged Marriage
description:
~💍Arranged Marriage 💍~

"Amidst the halls of the castle and the weight of an arranged marriage, Prince Philippe faces the sacrifices of an heir to the throne. But a day of bitter memories and unexpected encounters changes everything. As the sound of forbidden love echoes in the silence, Philippe discovers a young bride on the verge of escape. Two hearts bound by imposed destinies, both searching for something they may never have. Will that day lead them to answers or only more doubts?"

Tag: Enemies to lovers / arranged marriage / Royalty / angst / prince

Prince Derek
